Exception if there is another comment explaining the exception below[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:34, 17 March 2025 (UTC)}} '''安房国の式内社一覧'''（あわのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[安房国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。 また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 == 式内社 == 『延喜式』神名帳では、大社2座2社（うちMyojin Taisha社1座1社）・小社4座4社の計6座6社を記載。 {{List of Shikinai Shrines/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳}} ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=3 | Designated Shrines ! style="background:#a0f0a0" rowspan=2 | Compilation |- style="white-space:nowrap;" ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Reading ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Rank ! style="background:#a0f0a0;" | Note ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Location ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.3em; padding-left:2.3em;" | Remarks |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[安房郡]]''' 2座（並大） |- |'''安房坐神社'''||ahano-||Myojin Taisha||月次新嘗||[[安房神社]]||[[千葉県]][[館山市]]大神宮||安房国[[一宮]]||[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/170101.html] |- |rowspan=2|'''后神天比理乃咩命神社'''||rowspan=2|mimeno-amehirinohimeno-||rowspan=2|大||rowspan=2|元名洲神||（{{ill|candidate shrines|ja|論社|lt=candidate}}）[[洲崎神社]]||千葉県館山市洲崎||||rowspan=2|[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/170201.html] |- |（{{ill|candidate shrines|ja|論社|lt=candidate}}）[[洲宮神社]]||千葉県館山市洲宮|| |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[朝夷郡]]''' 4座（並小） |- |'''天神社'''||||Shikinai Shosha||||[[下立松原神社#白浜町の下立松原神社|下立松原神社]]||千葉県南房総市白浜町滝口|||| |- |rowspan=2|'''莫越山神社'''||rowspan=2|nakoshinoyamano
nakoshiyamano||rowspan=2|Shikinai Shosha||rowspan=2|　||（{{ill|candidate shrines|ja|論社|lt=candidate}}）莫越山神社||千葉県南房総市宮下||||rowspan=2|　 |- |（{{ill|candidate shrines|ja|論社|lt=candidate}}）莫越山神社||千葉県南房総市沓見|| |- |rowspan=2|'''[[下立松原神社]]'''||rowspan=2|shimotachimatsuharano
shimotate-||rowspan=2|Shikinai Shosha||rowspan=2|　||（{{ill|candidate shrines|ja|論社|lt=candidate}}）[[下立松原神社#白浜町の下立松原神社|下立松原神社]]||千葉県南房総市白浜町滝口||||rowspan=2|　 |- |（{{ill|candidate shrines|ja|論社|lt=candidate}}）[[下立松原神社#千倉町の下立松原神社|下立松原神社]]||千葉県南房総市千倉町牧田|| |- |'''高家神社'''||takaiheno||Shikinai Shosha||||[[高家神社]]||千葉県南房総市千倉町南朝夷|||| |} == 式外社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが、同帳に記載の無い神社。 == 参考文献 == * 皇典講究所・全国神職会校訂[{{NDLDC|1442211/160}} 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4th year ） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn * [{{NDLDC|1273537/37}} 『延喜式 第2』]（日本古典全集刊行会、昭和4th year ） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn == 外部rinku == * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjastate17.html 安房国 式内社6座] - 國學院大學21世紀COEプroグramu「神道・神社史料集成」 {{式内社一覧}} {{citation needed|あわのくにのしきないしやいちらん}} {{citation needed|安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines}}{{citation needed|安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in 安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|Lists of Shikinaisha 安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province}} {{draft categories| [[Category:11]] [[Category:erroneous transclusions of 安房国の式内社一覧]] [[Category:安房国の式内社|*]] [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:List of Shikinai Shrines]] [[Category:to be resorted]] [[Category:Shikinai Shrine replacements]] [[Category:New]] }} [[sn:安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines]] [[ja:安房国の式内社一覧]] [[sn:List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Chiba)]] [[sn:安房国の式内社一覧]] [[sn:List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province]] {{DEFAULTSORT:List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Chiba)}}

So things might be a bit unexpected.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:01, 18 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=If this is in the format "List of Shikinaisha in X" then I have linked all existing shrines into the table. Otherwise I have not. Translation of the texts will come later as it is a lot less difficult than the tables. Exception if there is another comment explaining the exception below[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:34, 17 March 2025 (UTC)}} '''安房国の式内社一覧'''（あわのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[安房国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。 また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 == 式内社 == 『延喜式』神名帳では、大社2座2社（うちMyojin Taisha社1座1社）・小社4座4社の計6座6社を記載。 {{List of Shikinai Shrines/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}} ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=3 | Designated Shrines ! style="background:#a0f0a0" rowspan=2 | Compilation |- style="white-space:nowrap;" ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Reading ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Rank ! style="background:#a0f0a0;" | Note ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Location ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.3em; padding-left:2.3em;" | Remarks |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[安房郡]]''' 2座（並大） |- |'''安房坐神社'''||ahano-||Myojin Taisha||月次新嘗||[[安房神社]]||[[千葉県]][[館山市]]大神宮||安房国[[一宮]]||[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/170101.html] |- |rowspan=2|'''后神天比理乃咩命神社'''||rowspan=2|mimeno-amehirinohimeno-||rowspan=2|大||rowspan=2|元名洲神||（{{ill|candidate shrines|ja|論社|lt=candidate|12=draft}}）[[洲崎神社]]||千葉県館山市洲崎||||rowspan=2|[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/170201.html] |- |（{{ill|candidate shrines|ja|論社|lt=candidate|12=draft}}）[[洲宮神社]]||千葉県館山市洲宮|| |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[朝夷郡]]''' 4座（並小） |- |'''天神社'''||||Shikinai Shosha||||[[下立松原神社#白浜町の下立松原神社|下立松原神社]]||千葉県南房総市白浜町滝口|||| |- |rowspan=2|'''莫越山神社'''||rowspan=2|nakoshinoyamano
nakoshiyamano||rowspan=2|Shikinai Shosha||rowspan=2|　||（{{ill|candidate shrines|ja|論社|lt=candidate|12=draft}}）莫越山神社||千葉県南房総市宮下||||rowspan=2|　 |- |（{{ill|candidate shrines|ja|論社|lt=candidate|12=draft}}）莫越山神社||千葉県南房総市沓見|| |- |rowspan=2|'''[[下立松原神社]]'''||rowspan=2|shimotachimatsuharano
shimotate-||rowspan=2|Shikinai Shosha||rowspan=2|　||（{{ill|candidate shrines|ja|論社|lt=candidate|12=draft}}）[[下立松原神社#白浜町の下立松原神社|下立松原神社]]||千葉県南房総市白浜町滝口||||rowspan=2|　 |- |（{{ill|candidate shrines|ja|論社|lt=candidate|12=draft}}）[[下立松原神社#千倉町の下立松原神社|下立松原神社]]||千葉県南房総市千倉町牧田|| |- |'''高家神社'''||takaiheno||Shikinai Shosha||||[[高家神社]]||千葉県南房総市千倉町南朝夷|||| |} == 式外社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが、同帳に記載の無い神社。 == 参考文献 == * 皇典講究所・全国神職会校訂[{{NDLDC|1442211/160}} 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4th year ） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn * [{{NDLDC|1273537/37}} 『延喜式 第2』]（日本古典全集刊行会、昭和4th year ） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn == 外部rinku == * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjastate17.html 安房国 式内社6座] - 國學院大學21世紀COEプroグramu「神道・神社史料集成」 {{式内社一覧}} {{citation needed|あわのくにのしきないしやいちらん}} {{citation needed|安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines}}{{citation needed|安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in 安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|Lists of Shikinaisha 安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province}} {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:11]] [[Category:erroneous transclusions of 安房国の式内社一覧]] [[Category:安房国の式内社|*]] [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]] [[Category:Pages to be translated]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:List of Shikinai Shrines]] [[Category:to be resorted]] [[Category:Shikinai Shrine replacements]] [[Category:New]] }} [[sn:安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines]] [[ja:安房国の式内社一覧]] [[sn:List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Chiba)]] [[sn:安房国の式内社一覧]] [[sn:List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province]] {{DEFAULTSORT:List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Chiba)}}

{{afc comment|1=Used substitition to get all the templates into here relatively easily. On enwiki if you want the templates extract them out of this page to make templates, The jawiki system is too hard[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:35, 31 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:49, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at [[List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province]] - [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=Switching over to deprecating the templates. So things might be a bit unexpected.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:01, 18 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=If this is in the format "List of Shikinaisha in X" then I have linked all existing shrines into the table. Otherwise I have not. Translation of the texts will come later as it is a lot less difficult than the tables. Exception if there is another comment explaining the exception below[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:34, 17 March 2025 (UTC)}} '''安房国の式内社一覧'''（あわのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[安房国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。 また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 == 式内社 == 『延喜式』神名帳では、大社2座2社（うちMyojin Taisha社1座1社）・小社4座4社の計6座6社を記載。 {{List of Shikinai Shrines/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Reading ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Rank ! Exception if there is another comment explaining the exception below[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:34, 17 March 2025 (UTC)}} '''安房国の式内社一覧'''（あわのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[安房国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。 また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 == 式内社 == 『延喜式』神名帳では、大社2座2社（うちMyojin Taisha社1座1社）・小社4座4社の計6座6社を記載。 {{List of Shikinai Shrines/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft|12=draft}} ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=3 | Designated Shrines ! style="background:#a0f0a0" rowspan=2 | Compilation |- style="white-space:nowrap;" ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Reading ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Rank ! style="background:#a0f0a0;" | Note ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Location ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.3em; padding-left:2.3em;" | Remarks |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[安房郡]]''' 2座（並大） |- |'''安房坐神社'''||ahano-||Myojin Taisha||月次新嘗||[[安房神社]]||[[千葉県]][[館山市]]大神宮||安房国[[一宮]]||[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/170101.html] |- |rowspan=2|'''后神天比理乃咩命神社'''||rowspan=2|mimeno-amehirinohimeno-||rowspan=2|大||rowspan=2|元名洲神||（{{ill|candidate shrines|ja|論社|lt=candidate|12=draft|12=draft}}）[[洲崎神社]]||千葉県館山市洲崎||||rowspan=2|[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/170201.html] |- |（{{ill|candidate shrines|ja|論社|lt=candidate|12=draft|12=draft}}）[[洲宮神社]]||千葉県館山市洲宮|| |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[朝夷郡]]''' 4座（並小） |- |'''天神社'''||||Shikinai Shosha||||[[下立松原神社#白浜町の下立松原神社|下立松原神社]]||千葉県南房総市白浜町滝口|||| |- |rowspan=2|'''莫越山神社'''||rowspan=2|nakoshinoyamano
nakoshiyamano||rowspan=2|Shikinai Shosha||rowspan=2|　||（{{ill|candidate shrines|ja|論社|lt=candidate|12=draft|12=draft}}）莫越山神社||千葉県南房総市宮下||||rowspan=2|　 |- |（{{ill|candidate shrines|ja|論社|lt=candidate|12=draft|12=draft}}）莫越山神社||千葉県南房総市沓見|| |- |rowspan=2|'''[[下立松原神社]]'''||rowspan=2|shimotachimatsuharano
shimotate-||rowspan=2|Shikinai Shosha||rowspan=2|　||（{{ill|candidate shrines|ja|論社|lt=candidate|12=draft|12=draft}}）[[下立松原神社#白浜町の下立松原神社|下立松原神社]]||千葉県南房総市白浜町滝口||||rowspan=2|　 |- |（{{ill|candidate shrines|ja|論社|lt=candidate|12=draft|12=draft}}）[[下立松原神社#千倉町の下立松原神社|下立松原神社]]||千葉県南房総市千倉町牧田|| |- |'''高家神社'''||takaiheno||Shikinai Shosha||||[[高家神社]]||千葉県南房総市千倉町南朝夷|||| |} == 式外社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが、同帳に記載の無い神社。 == 参考文献 == * 皇典講究所・全国神職会校訂[{{NDLDC|1442211/160}} 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4th year ） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn * [{{NDLDC|1273537/37}} 『延喜式 第2』]（日本古典全集刊行会、昭和4th year ） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn == 外部rinku == * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjastate17.html 安房国 式内社6座] - 國學院大學21世紀COEプroグramu「神道・神社史料集成」 {{式内社一覧}} {{citation needed|あわのくにのしきないしやいちらん}} {{citation needed|安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines}}{{citation needed|安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in 安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|Lists of Shikinaisha 安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province}} {{draft categories| [[Category:11]] [[Category:erroneous transclusions of 安房国の式内社一覧]] [[Category:安房国の式内社|*]] [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]] [[Category:qq]][[en:List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Chiba)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Pages to be translated]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:List of Shikinai Shrines]] [[Category:to be resorted]] [[Category:Shikinai Shrine replacements]] [[Category:New]] }} [[sn:安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines]] [[ja:安房国の式内社一覧]] [[sn:List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Chiba)]] [[sn:安房国の式内社一覧]] [[sn:List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province]] {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Chiba)}}

On enwiki if you want the templates extract them out of this page to make templates, The jawiki system is too hard[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:35, 31 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:49, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at [[List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province]] - [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=Switching over to deprecating the templates. So things might be a bit unexpected.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:01, 18 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=If this is in the format "List of Shikinaisha in X" then I have linked all existing shrines into the table. Otherwise I have not. Translation of the texts will come later as it is a lot less difficult than the tables. Exception if there is another comment explaining the exception below[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:34, 17 March 2025 (UTC)}} '''安房国の式内社一覧'''（あわのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[安房国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。 また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 == 式内社 == 『延喜式』神名帳では、大社2座2社（うちMyojin Taisha社1座1社）・小社4座4社の計6座6社を記載。 {{List of Shikinai Shrines/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft|12=draft}} ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=3 | Designated Shrines ! style="background:#a0f0a0" rowspan=2 | Compilation |- style="white-space:nowrap;" ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Reading ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Rank ! style="background:#a0f0a0;" | Note ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Location ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.3em; padding-left:2.3em;" | Remarks |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[安房郡]]''' 2座（並大） |- |'''安房坐神社'''||ahano-||Myojin Taisha||月次新嘗||[[安房神社]]||[[千葉県]][[館山市]]大神宮||安房国[[一宮]]||[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/170101.html] |- |rowspan=2|'''后神天比理乃咩命神社'''||rowspan=2|mimeno-amehirinohimeno-||rowspan=2|大||rowspan=2|元名洲神||（{{ill|candidate shrines|ja|論社|lt=candidate|12=draft|12=draft}}）[[洲崎神社]]||千葉県館山市洲崎||||rowspan=2|[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/170201.html] |- |（{{ill|candidate shrines|ja|論社|lt=candidate|12=draft|12=draft}}）[[洲宮神社]]||千葉県館山市洲宮|| |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[朝夷郡]]''' 4座（並小） |- |'''天神社'''||||Shikinai Shosha||||[[下立松原神社#白浜町の下立松原神社|下立松原神社]]||千葉県南房総市白浜町滝口|||| |- |rowspan=2|'''莫越山神社'''||rowspan=2|nakoshinoyamano
nakoshiyamano||rowspan=2|Shikinai Shosha||rowspan=2|　||（{{ill|candidate shrines|ja|論社|lt=candidate|12=draft|12=draft}}）莫越山神社||千葉県南房総市宮下||||rowspan=2|　 |- |（{{ill|candidate shrines|ja|論社|lt=candidate|12=draft|12=draft}}）莫越山神社||千葉県南房総市沓見|| |- |rowspan=2|'''[[下立松原神社]]'''||rowspan=2|shimotachimatsuharano
shimotate-||rowspan=2|Shikinai Shosha||rowspan=2|　||（{{ill|candidate shrines|ja|論社|lt=candidate|12=draft|12=draft}}）[[下立松原神社#白浜町の下立松原神社|下立松原神社]]||千葉県南房総市白浜町滝口||||rowspan=2|　 |- |（{{ill|candidate shrines|ja|論社|lt=candidate|12=draft|12=draft}}）[[下立松原神社#千倉町の下立松原神社|下立松原神社]]||千葉県南房総市千倉町牧田|| |- |'''高家神社'''||takaiheno||Shikinai Shosha||||[[高家神社]]||千葉県南房総市千倉町南朝夷|||| |} == 式外社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが、同帳に記載の無い神社。 == 参考文献 == * 皇典講究所・全国神職会校訂[{{NDLDC|1442211/160}} 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4th year ） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn * [{{NDLDC|1273537/37}} 『延喜式 第2』]（日本古典全集刊行会、昭和4th year ） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn == 外部rinku == * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjastate17.html 安房国 式内社6座] - 國學院大學21世紀COEプroグramu「神道・神社史料集成」 {{式内社一覧}} {{citation needed|あわのくにのしきないしやいちらん}} {{citation needed|安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines}}{{citation needed|安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in 安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|Lists of Shikinaisha 安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province}} {{draft categories| [[Category:11]] [[Category:erroneous transclusions of 安房国の式内社一覧]] [[Category:安房国の式内社|*]] [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]] [[Category:qq]][[en:List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Chiba)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Pages to be translated]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:List of Shikinai Shrines]] [[Category:to be resorted]] [[Category:Shikinai Shrine replacements]] [[Category:New]] }} [[sn:安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines]] [[ja:安房国の式内社一覧]] [[sn:List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Chiba)]] [[sn:安房国の式内社一覧]] [[sn:List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province]] {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Chiba)}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "List of Shikinai Shrines/Legend" to "List of Shikinaisha/Legend"
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=Used substitition to get all the templates into here relatively easily. On enwiki if you want the templates extract them out of this page to make templates, The jawiki system is too hard[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:35, 31 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:49, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at [[List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province]] - [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page target for move is at List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 26 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=Switching over to deprecating the templates. So things might be a bit unexpected.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:01, 18 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=If this is in the format "List of Shikinaisha in X" then I have linked all existing shrines into the table. Otherwise I have not. Translation of the texts will come later as it is a lot less difficult than the tables. Exception if there is another comment explaining the exception below[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:34, 17 March 2025 (UTC)}} '''安房国の式内社一覧'''（あわのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[安房国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。 また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 == 式内社 == 『延喜式』神名帳では、大社2座2社（うちMyojin Taisha社1座1社）・小社4座4社の計6座6社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Reading ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Rank ! style="background:#a0f0a0;" | Note ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Location ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.3em; padding-left:2.3em;" | Remarks |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[安房郡]]''' 2座（並大） |- |'''安房坐神社'''||ahano-||Myojin Taisha||月次新嘗||[[安房神社]]||[[千葉県]][[館山市]]大神宮||安房国[[一宮]]||[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/170101.html] |- |rowspan=2|'''后神天比理乃咩命神社'''||rowspan=2|mimeno-amehirinohimeno-||rowspan=2|大||rowspan=2|元名洲神||（{{ill|candidate shrines|ja|論社|lt=candidate|12=draft|12=draft}}）[[洲崎神社]]||千葉県館山市洲崎||||rowspan=2|[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/170201.html] |- |（{{ill|candidate shrines|ja|論社|lt=candidate|12=draft|12=draft}}）[[洲宮神社]]||千葉県館山市洲宮|| |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[朝夷郡]]''' 4座（並小） |- |'''天神社'''||||Shikinai Shosha||||[[下立松原神社#白浜町の下立松原神社|下立松原神社]]||千葉県南房総市白浜町滝口|||| |- |rowspan=2|'''莫越山神社'''||rowspan=2|nakoshinoyamano

So things might be a bit unexpected.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:01, 18 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=If this is in the format "List of Shikinaisha in X" then I have linked all existing shrines into the table. Otherwise I have not. Translation of the texts will come later as it is a lot less difficult than the tables. Exception if there is another comment explaining the exception below[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:34, 17 March 2025 (UTC)}} '''安房国の式内社一覧'''（あわのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[安房国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。 また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 == 式内社 == 『延喜式』神名帳では、大社2座2社（うちMyojin Taisha社1座1社）・小社4座4社の計6座6社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft|12=draft}} ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=3 | Designated Shrines ! style="background:#a0f0a0" rowspan=2 | Compilation |- style="white-space:nowrap;" ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Reading ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Rank ! style="background:#a0f0a0;" | Note ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Location ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.3em; padding-left:2.3em;" | Remarks |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[安房郡]]''' 2座（並大） |- |'''安房坐神社'''||ahano-||Myojin Taisha||月次新嘗||[[安房神社]]||[[千葉県]][[館山市]]大神宮||安房国[[一宮]]||[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/170101.html] |- |rowspan=2|'''后神天比理乃咩命神社'''||rowspan=2|mimeno-amehirinohimeno-||rowspan=2|大||rowspan=2|元名洲神||（{{ill|candidate shrines|ja|論社|lt=candidate|12=draft|12=draft}}）[[洲崎神社]]||千葉県館山市洲崎||||rowspan=2|[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/170201.html] |- |（{{ill|candidate shrines|ja|論社|lt=candidate|12=draft|12=draft}}）[[洲宮神社]]||千葉県館山市洲宮|| |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[朝夷郡]]''' 4座（並小） |- |'''天神社'''||||Shikinai Shosha||||[[下立松原神社#白浜町の下立松原神社|下立松原神社]]||千葉県南房総市白浜町滝口|||| |- |rowspan=2|'''莫越山神社'''||rowspan=2|nakoshinoyamano
nakoshiyamano||rowspan=2|Shikinai Shosha||rowspan=2|　||（{{ill|candidate shrines|ja|論社|lt=candidate|12=draft|12=draft}}）莫越山神社||千葉県南房総市宮下||||rowspan=2|　 |- |（{{ill|candidate shrines|ja|論社|lt=candidate|12=draft|12=draft}}）莫越山神社||千葉県南房総市沓見|| |- |rowspan=2|'''[[下立松原神社]]'''||rowspan=2|shimotachimatsuharano
shimotate-||rowspan=2|Shikinai Shosha||rowspan=2|　||（{{ill|candidate shrines|ja|論社|lt=candidate|12=draft|12=draft}}）[[下立松原神社#白浜町の下立松原神社|下立松原神社]]||千葉県南房総市白浜町滝口||||rowspan=2|　 |- |（{{ill|candidate shrines|ja|論社|lt=candidate|12=draft|12=draft}}）[[下立松原神社#千倉町の下立松原神社|下立松原神社]]||千葉県南房総市千倉町牧田|| |- |'''高家神社'''||takaiheno||Shikinai Shosha||||[[高家神社]]||千葉県南房総市千倉町南朝夷|||| |} == 式外社 == 『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが、同帳に記載の無い神社。 == References == ===Notelist=== ===Reflist=== {{reflist}} * 皇典講究所・全国神職会校訂[{{NDLDC|1442211/160}} 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4th year ） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn * [{{NDLDC|1273537/37}} 『延喜式 第2』]（日本古典全集刊行会、昭和4th year ） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn == External links == * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjastate17.html 安房国 式内社6座] - 國學院大學21世紀COEプroグramu「神道・神社史料集成」 {{式内社一覧}} {{citation needed|あわのくにのしきないしやいちらん}} {{citation needed|安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines}}{{citation needed|安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in 安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|Lists of Shikinaisha 安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province}} {{draft categories| [[Category:11]] [[Category:erroneous transclusions of 安房国の式内社一覧]] [[Category:安房国の式内社|*]] [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]] [[en:List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Chiba)]][[Category:Pages to be translated]] [[Category:Shikinai Shrine replacements]] [[Category:New]] }} [[sn:安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines]] [[ja:安房国の式内社一覧]] [[sn:List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Chiba)]] [[sn:安房国の式内社一覧]] [[sn:List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province]] {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Chiba)}}

style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Reading ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Rank ! This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Chiba)'''. Or the list of shrines in Awa Province (Chiba) which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|12=draft|12=draft}} of LALALAList of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Chiba) which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]] == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == 『延喜式』神名帳では、大社2座2社（うちMyojin Taisha社1座1社）・小社4座4社の計6座6社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! [[category: Lists of Shikinaisha by location top]][[category: Lists of Shikinaisha by location top]]This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Chiba)'''. Or the list of shrines in Awa Province (Chiba) which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|12=draft|12=draft}} of Awa Province (Chiba) which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]] == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == 『延喜式』神名帳では、大社2座2社（うちMyojin Taisha社1座1社）・小社4座4社の計6座6社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|12=draft|12=draft}} ! [[Category:Shikinaisha top]]This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Chiba)'''. Or the list of shrines in Awa Province (Chiba) which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|12=draft|12=draft}} of Awa Province (Chiba) which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]] == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == 『延喜式』神名帳では、大社2座2社（うちMyojin Taisha社1座1社）・小社4座4社の計6座6社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! [[Category:Shikinaisha top]] [[Category:Ones with only the top marked]] [[Category:Shikinaisha top]] [[Category:Ones with only the top marked]] This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Chiba)'''. Or the list of shrines in Awa Province (Chiba) which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|12=draft|12=draft}} of Awa Province (Chiba) which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]] == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == 『延喜式』神名帳では、大社2座2社（うちMyojin Taisha社1座1社）・小社4座4社の計6座6社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! [[Category:Shikinaisha top]] [[Category:Shikinaisha top]] This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Chiba)'''. Or the list of shrines in Awa Province (Chiba) which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|12=draft|12=draft}} of Awa Province (Chiba) which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]] == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == 『延喜式』神名帳では、大社2座2社（うちMyojin Taisha社1座1社）・小社4座4社の計6座6社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! [[Category:Shikinaisha top]] [[Category:Shikinaisha top]] This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Chiba)'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Awa Province (Chiba)]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|12=draft|12=draft}} of [[Awa Province (Chiba)]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]] == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == 『延喜式』神名帳では、大社2座2社（うちMyojin Taisha社1座1社）・小社4座4社の計6座6社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! revision.text:
[[Category:Shikinaisha top]] [[Category:Shikinaisha top]] This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Chiba)'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Awa Province (Chiba)]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha}} of [[Awa Province (Chiba)]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion.[[Category:edited lists]] [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]] == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == 『延喜式』神名帳では、大社2座2社（うちMyojin Taisha社1座1社）・小社4座4社の計6座6社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! revision.text:
'''安房国の式内社一覧'''（あわのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[延喜式]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[安房国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。 また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 == 式内社 == 『延喜式』神名帳では、大社2座2社（うち名神大社1座1社）・小社4座4社の計6座6社を記載。 {{式内社一覧/凡例}} {{式内社一覧/header}} |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[安房郡]]''' 2座（並大） |- |'''安房坐神社'''||アハノ-||名神大||月次新嘗||[[安房神社]]||[[千葉県]][[館山市]]大神宮||安房国[[一宮]]||[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/170101.html] |- |rowspan=2|'''后神天比理乃咩命神社'''||rowspan=2|ミメノ-アメヒリノヒメノ-||rowspan=2|大||rowspan=2|元名洲神||（論）[[洲崎神社]]||千葉県館山市洲崎||||rowspan=2|[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/170201.html] |- |（論）[[洲宮神社]]||千葉県館山市洲宮|| |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[朝夷郡]]''' 4座（並小） |- |'''天神社'''||||小||||[[下立松原神社#白浜町の下立松原神社|下立松原神社]]||千葉県南房総市白浜町滝口|||| |- |rowspan=2|'''莫越山神社'''||rowspan=2|ナコシノヤマノ
ナコシヤマノ||rowspan=2|小||rowspan=2|　||（論）莫越山神社||千葉県南房総市宮下||||rowspan=2|　 |- |（論）莫越山神社||千葉県南房総市沓見|| |- |rowspan=2|'''[[下立松原神社]]'''||rowspan=2|シモタチマツハラノ
シモタテ-||rowspan=2|小||rowspan=2|　||（論）[[下立松原神社#白浜町の下立松原神社|下立松原神社]]||千葉県南房総市白浜町滝口||||rowspan=2|　 |- |（論）[[下立松原神社#千倉町の下立松原神社|下立松原神社]]||千葉県南房総市千倉町牧田|| |- |'''高家神社'''||タカイヘノ||小||||[[高家神社]]||千葉県南房総市千倉町南朝夷|||| |} == 式外社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが、同帳に記載の無い神社。 == 参考文献 == * 皇典講究所・全国神職会校訂[{{NDLDC|1442211/160}} 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4年） - 国立国会図書館デジタルコレクション * [{{NDLDC|1273537/37}} 『延喜式 第2』]（日本古典全集刊行会、昭和4年） - 国立国会図書館デジタルコレクション == 外部リンク == * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjastate17.html 安房国 式内社6座] - 國學院大學21世紀COEプログラム「神道・神社史料集成」 {{式内社一覧}} {{DEFAULTSORT:あわのくにのしきないしやいちらん}} [[Category:安房国の式内社|*]] [[Category:式内社の一覧]]

'''安房国の式内社一覧'''（あわのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[延喜式]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「[[式内社]]」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[安房国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。 また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。 == 式内社 == 『延喜式』神名帳では、大社2座2社（うち名神大社1座1社）・小社4座4社の計6座6社を記載。 {{式内社一覧/凡例}} {{式内社一覧/header}} |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[安房郡]]''' 2座（並大） |- |'''安房坐神社'''||アハノ-||名神大||月次新嘗||[[安房神社]]||[[千葉県]][[館山市]]大神宮||安房国[[一宮]]||[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/170101.html] |- |rowspan=2|'''后神天比理乃咩命神社'''||rowspan=2|ミメノ-アメヒリノヒメノ-||rowspan=2|大||rowspan=2|元名洲神||（論）[[洲崎神社]]||千葉県館山市洲崎||||rowspan=2|[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/170201.html] |- |（論）[[洲宮神社]]||千葉県館山市洲宮|| |- |colspan=8 style="background-color:#ccffcc;"|'''[[朝夷郡]]''' 4座（並小） |- |'''天神社'''||||小||||[[下立松原神社#白浜町の下立松原神社|下立松原神社]]||千葉県南房総市白浜町滝口|||| |- |rowspan=2|'''莫越山神社'''||rowspan=2|ナコシノヤマノ

シモタテ-||rowspan=2|小||rowspan=2|　||（論）[[下立松原神社#白浜町の下立松原神社|下立松原神社]]||千葉県南房総市白浜町滝口||||rowspan=2|　 |- |（論）[[下立松原神社#千倉町の下立松原神社|下立松原神社]]||千葉県南房総市千倉町牧田|| |- |'''高家神社'''||タカイヘノ||小||||[[高家神社]]||千葉県南房総市千倉町南朝夷|||| |} == 式外社 == {{節stub}} 『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが、同帳に記載の無い神社。 == 参考文献 == * 皇典講究所・全国神職会校訂[{{NDLDC|1442211/160}} 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4年） - 国立国会図書館デジタルコレクション * [{{NDLDC|1273537/37}} 『延喜式 第2』]（日本古典全集刊行会、昭和4年） - 国立国会図書館デジタルコレクション == 外部リンク == * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjastate17.html 安房国 式内社6座] - 國學院大學21世紀COEプログラム「神道・神社史料集成」 {{式内社一覧}} {{DEFAULTSORT:あわのくにのしきないしやいちらん}} [[Category:安房国の式内社|*]] [[Category:式内社の一覧]]

revision.text:
[[Category:Shikinaisha top]] [[Category:Shikinaisha top]] This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Chiba)'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Awa Province (Chiba)]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha}} of [[Awa Province (Chiba)]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion.[[Category:edited lists]] [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]] == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == 『延喜式』神名帳では、大社2座2社（うちMyojin Taisha社1座1社）・小社4座4社の計6座6社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=4 | {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho}} ! style="background:#a0f0a0" colspan=3 | Designated Shrines ! style="background:#a0f0a0" rowspan=2 | Compilation |- style="white-space:nowrap;" ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Reading ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.1em; padding-left:2.1em;" | Rank ! style="background:#a0f0a0;" | Note ! style="background:#a0f0a0; padding-right:2.6em; padding-left:2.6em;" | Shrine Name ! shimotate-||rowspan=2|Shikinai Shosha||rowspan=2|　||（{{ill|candidate shrines|ja|論社|lt=candidate}}）[[下立松原神社#白浜町の下立松原神社|下立松原神社]]||千葉県南房総市白浜町滝口||||rowspan=2|　 |- |（{{ill|candidate shrines|ja|論社|lt=candidate}}）[[下立松原神社#千倉町の下立松原神社|下立松原神社]]||千葉県南房総市千倉町牧田|| |- |'''高家神社'''||takaiheno||Shikinai Shosha||||[[高家神社]]||千葉県南房総市千倉町南朝夷|||| |} == 式外社 == 『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが、同帳に記載の無い神社。 == References == ===Notelist=== ===Reflist=== {{reflist}} * 皇典講究所・全国神職会校訂[{{NDLDC|1442211/160}} 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4th year ） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn * [{{NDLDC|1273537/37}} 『延喜式 第2』]（日本古典全集刊行会、昭和4th year ） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn == External links == * [http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/jinjastate17.html 安房国 式内社6座] - 國學院大學21世紀COEプroグramu「神道・神社史料集成」 {{citation needed|あわのくにのしきないしやいちらん}} {{citation needed|安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines}}{{citation needed|安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in 安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|Lists of Shikinaisha 安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province}} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province}} {{draft categories| }} {{citation needed|List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Chiba)}} {{draft categories| [[Category:qq]][[sn:List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Chiba)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:erroneous transclusions of 安房国の式内社一覧]] [[Category:安房国の式内社|*]] [[Category:Lists of Shikinaisha by location]] [[Category:Pages to be translated]] [[Category:New]] }} [[en:List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Chiba)]] [[sn:安房国のList of Shikinai Shrines]] [[ja:安房国の式内社一覧]] [[sn:List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Chiba)]] [[sn:安房国の式内社一覧]] [[sn:List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province]][[Category:Shikinaisha bottom]][[Category:Shikinaisha bottom]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Chiba)]][[Category:qq]] {{List of Shikinai Shrines}} {{translated page|ja|安房国の式内社一覧|version=56551073|comment=Imported full ja history}}

revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Chiba)'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Awa Province (Chiba)]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|12=draft}} of [[Awa Province (Chiba)]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == 『延喜式』神名帳では、大社2座2社（うちMyojin Taisha社1座1社）・小社4座4社の計6座6社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! revision.comment: Text replacement - "12=draft" to "qq=draft"
revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Chiba)'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Awa Province (Chiba)]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft}} of [[Awa Province (Chiba)]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == 『延喜式』神名帳では、大社2座2社（うちMyojin Taisha社1座1社）・小社4座4社の計6座6社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Chiba)'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Awa Province (Chiba)]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft}} of [[Awa Province (Chiba)]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == 『延喜式』神名帳では、大社2座2社（うちMyojin Taisha社1座1社）・小社4座4社の計6座6社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Chiba)'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Awa Province (Chiba)]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft}} of [[Awa Province (Chiba)]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion. == Shikinai Shrines (式内社) == 『延喜式』神名帳では、大社2座2社（うちMyojin Taisha社1座1社）・小社4座4社の計6座6社を記載。 {{List of Shikinaisha/Legend}} {| class="wikitable" style="background:#ffffff; font-size:85%" ! This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Chiba)'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Awa Province (Chiba)]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=}} of [[Awa Province (Chiba)]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion.
== Shikinaisha (式内社) == In the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|de|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|zh|延喜式神名帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}, two great shrines (including one Myōjin Taisha) and four minor shrines are recorded, six shrines in total.

revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Chiba)'''. Or the list of shrines in [[Awa Province (Chiba)]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Awa Province (Chiba)]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion.
== Shikinaisha (式内社) == In the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|de|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|zh|延喜式神名帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}, two great shrines (including one Myōjin Taisha) and four minor shrines are recorded, six shrines in total.

Or the list of shrines in [[:en:Awa Province (Chiba)|Awa Province (Chiba)]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Chiba)'''. Or the list of shrines in [[:en:Awa Province (Chiba)|Awa Province (Chiba)]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[:en:Awa Province (Chiba)|Awa Province (Chiba)]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion.
== Shikinaisha (式内社) == In the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|de|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|zh|延喜式神名帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}, two great shrines (including one Myōjin Taisha) and four minor shrines are recorded, six shrines in total.

revision.text:
This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Chiba)'''. Or the list of shrines in [[:en:Awa Province (Chiba)|Awa Province (Chiba)]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[:en:Awa Province (Chiba)|Awa Province (Chiba)]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion.
== Shikinaisha (式内社) == In the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|de|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|zh|延喜式神名帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}, two great shrines (including one Myōjin Taisha) and four minor shrines are recorded, six shrines in total.

== 式外社 ==
『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが、同帳に記載の無い神社。
== References == ===Notelist=== <references group="Note"/> ===Reflist=== {{reflist}} * 皇典講究所・全国神職会校訂[{{NDLDC|1442211/160}} 『延喜式 上巻』]（大岡山書店、昭和4th year ） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn * [{{NDLDC|1273537/37}} 『延喜式 第2』]（日本古典全集刊行会、昭和4th year ） - 国立国会図書館デジtarukorekushiョn

So things might be a bit unexpected.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:01, 18 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=If this is in the format "List of Shikinaisha in X" then I have linked all existing shrines into the table. Otherwise I have not. Translation of the texts will come later as it is a lot less difficult than the tables. '''安房国の式内社一覧'''（あわのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「{{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[安房国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。
また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11450714]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:52, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Chiba)'''. Or the list of shrines in [[:en:Awa Province (Chiba)|Awa Province (Chiba)]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[:en:Awa Province (Chiba)|Awa Province (Chiba)]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion.
== Shikinaisha (式内社) == In the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|de|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|zh|延喜式神名帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}, two great shrines (including one Myōjin Taisha) and four minor shrines are recorded, six shrines in total.

'''安房国の式内社一覧'''（あわのくにのしきないしゃいちらん）は、『[[Engishiki]]』第9巻・第10巻「神名帳上下」（[[延喜式神名帳]]）に記載のある[[神社]]、いわゆる「{{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}」およびその[[論社]]のうち、[[安房国]]に分類されている神社の一覧。
また『延喜式』神名帳の編纂当時に存在したが同帳に記載の無い神社、いわゆる「[[式外社]]」についても付記する。

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11450714]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:52, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Chiba)'''. Or the list of shrines in [[:en:Awa Province (Chiba)|Awa Province (Chiba)]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[:en:Awa Province (Chiba)|Awa Province (Chiba)]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}. We will cover them in a separate list to avoid confusion.
== Shikinaisha (式内社) == In the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|de|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|zh|延喜式神名帳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}, two great shrines (including one Myōjin Taisha) and four minor shrines are recorded, six shrines in total.

The ''Engishiki'' counts **6 shikinaisha** in the province – **4 shosha** and **2 taisha**.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:34, 28 June 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Chiba)''' or the list of shrines in [[Awa Province (Chiba)]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Awa Province (Chiba)]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 6 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 4 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 2 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:40, 28 June 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Chiba)''' or the list of shrines in [[Awa Province (Chiba)]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Awa Province (Chiba)]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 6 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 4 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 2 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:24, 28 June 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Chiba)''' or the list of shrines in [[Awa Province (Chiba)]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Awa Province (Chiba)]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 6 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 4 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 2 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:48, 28 June 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Chiba)''' or the list of shrines in [[Awa Province (Chiba)]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Awa Province (Chiba)]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 6 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 4 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 2 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11450714]]
[[:ja:安房国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 11:06, 28 June 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Chiba)''' or the list of shrines in [[Awa Province (Chiba)]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Awa Province (Chiba)]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 6 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 4 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 2 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 14:59, 30 June 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Chiba)''' or the list of shrines in [[Awa Province (Chiba)]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Awa Province (Chiba)]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 6 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 4 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 2 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 6 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 4 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 2 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Awa Province (Chiba)]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 6 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 4 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 2 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11450714]]
[[:ja:安房国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:43, 7 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Chiba)''' or the list of shrines in [[Awa Province (Chiba)]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Awa Province (Chiba)]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 6 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 4 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 2 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.

revision.comment: Bot: refresh list tables from Wikidata (counts fixed)
revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11450714]]
[[:ja:安房国の式内社一覧]]
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 21:35, 12 July 2025 (UTC)}} This is a '''List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Chiba)''' or the list of shrines in [[Awa Province (Chiba)]] which is present in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}
On this page we will also cover the {{ill|Shikigeisha|ja|式外社|1=Shikigeisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikigeisha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 延喜式神名帳|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} of [[Awa Province (Chiba)]] which are shrines that are known to have existed at that time due to other historical records, such as the [[Rikkokushi]], but for some reason were excluded from the Engishiki list. They are shown in a separate table to avoid confusion.
The {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} counts 6 {{ill|Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} in the province – 4 {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|WD=Q134917287}} and 2 {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}.
== Shikinaisha (式内社) == {| class="wikitable sortable" ! Prov !! Name !! Kana !! Rank |- | 1 || {{ill|Awa Shrine|WD=Q705547}} || あわじんじゃ || Myojin Taisha |- | 2 || {{ill|Mimeno-amehirinohimeno- shrine|WD=Q135039751}} || ミメノ-アメヒリノヒメノ- || Shikinai Taisha |- | 3 || {{ill|Shimotate matsubara-jinja|WD=Q11361262}} || しもたてまつばらじんじゃ || Shikinai Shosha |- | 4 || {{ill|Nakoshinoyamano shrine|WD=Q135039752}} || || Shikinai Shosha |- | 5 || {{ill|Shimotate matsubara-jinja|WD=Q11361262}} || しもたてまつばらじんじゃ || Shikinai Shosha |- | 6 || {{ill|Takabe Shrine|WD=Q11669186}} || たかべじんじゃ || Shikinai Shosha |}

This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Awa Province (Chiba)]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 6 Shikinaisha in the province – 4 Shikinai Shosha and 2 Shikinai Taisha.

This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Awa Province (Chiba)]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 6 Shikinaisha in the province – 4 Shikinai Shosha and 2 Shikinai Taisha.

This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Awa Province (Chiba)]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 6 Shikinaisha in the province – 4 Shikinai Shosha and 2 Shikinai Taisha.

This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Awa Province (Chiba)]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 6 Shikinaisha in the province – 4 Shikinai Shosha and 2 Shikinai Taisha.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 6 Shikinaisha in the province – 4 Shikinai Shosha and 2 Shikinai Taisha.

This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Awa Province (Chiba)]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 6 Shikinaisha in the province – 4 Shikinai Shosha and 2 Shikinai Taisha.

This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Awa Province (Chiba)]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 6 Shikinaisha in the province – 4 Shikinai Shosha and 2 Shikinai Taisha.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 6 Shikinaisha in the province – 4 Shikinai Shosha and 2 Shikinai Taisha.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:33, 21 November 2025 (UTC)}}
This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Awa Province (Chiba)]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 6 Shikinaisha in the province – 4 Shikinai Shosha and 2 Shikinai Taisha.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 6 Shikinaisha in the province – 4 Shikinai Shosha and 2 Shikinai Taisha.

This is a list of Shikinaisha in [[Awa Province (Chiba)]]. That is the shrines in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]] in the province.

The Engishiki Jinmyōchō counts 6 Shikinaisha in the province – 4 Shikinai Shōsha and 2 Shikinai Taisha.

== Shikinaisha (式内社) ==
